description: Pre-implementation coverage baseline for IFC-248 (Lead List & Create Page Tests). Test-authoring DELTA task — NO production code changes. Primary target is apps/web/src/components/leads/lead-list.tsx (the list surface: filtering/sorting/bulk-ops/row-actions/badges) which sits at ~37% because the existing lead-list.test.tsx stubs out SearchFilterBar filters/sort, DataTable bulkActions+cells, the dialogs, and TableRowActions. Secondary: apps/web/src/app/leads/(list)/LeadsPageClient.tsx (0%, trivial wrapper). The create page (NewLeadForm.tsx, already 93.9%) and the bulk-actions.ts helper (51 tests) are already covered and out of scope. T7 role filter is exercised at the API level (lead.router.ts list proc) via lead.router.security.test.ts (no coverage-delta target — existing source).
measurement_scope: apps/web/src/app/leads/(list)/new/NewLeadForm.tsx (REFERENCE — already covered, no new file required)

apps/web/src/components/leads/lead-list..note: Uncovered ~418-525 (bulk runners/handlers, rowActionHandlers, mutation onSuccess/onError) and ~689-848 (dialogs + StatusBadge + ScoreBadge). This is the gap IFC-248 closes.

apps/web/src/app/leads/(list)/LeadsPageC.note: Trivial pass-through wrapper; no dedicated test. New isolation test added.

apps/web/src/app/leads/(list)/new/NewLea.note: Already covered by new/__tests__/page.test.tsx (~30 tests). Reference only — confirms T3 done. Uncovered stray lines 262, 336, 406.

notes: Baseline measured with Istanbul provider via the scoped vitest command above.
AFTER snapshot artifacts/coverage/IFC-248-after.json is the binding reference for the coverage-gte-90 gate.
No production source is modified by IFC-248, so Sonar new_coverage (changed production lines) has no exposure; the gate is whole-file coverage improvement on the targets.
